context: Tests whether the agent uses ioredis with a server-side Lua script for atomic inventory reservation, implements correct return semantics, releases inventory via incrby on failure, syncs to database, and implements the fair waiting room using Redis sorted-set commands.

checklist.name: ioredis library
checklist.description: Imports and uses ioredis (not redis, node-redis, or any other Redis client library)

checklist.name: Lua script via eval
checklist.description: Uses redis.eval() to execute a Lua script for atomic inventory check-and-decrement (not separate GET + DECRBY calls)

checklist.name: Reserve returns 1
checklist.description: Lua script returns 1 to indicate a successful reservation

checklist.name: Reserve returns 0
checklist.description: Lua script returns 0 to indicate out-of-stock (current quantity less than requested)

checklist.name: Reserve returns -1
checklist.description: Lua script returns -1 (or handles nil) to indicate the product key does not exist

checklist.name: incrby release
checklist.description: releaseInventory uses redis.incrby() (not redis.set or redis.incr) to return stock to the pool

checklist.name: DB sync function
checklist.description: syncInventoryToDatabase iterates over inventory:* keys and calls a database update for each product

checklist.name: zadd with timestamp
checklist.description: enterWaitingRoom uses redis.zadd with the current timestamp (Date.now() or similar) as the score for FIFO ordering

checklist.name: zrank for position
checklist.description: enterWaitingRoom uses redis.zrank to retrieve the customer's queue position

checklist.name: zpopmin for admission
checklist.description: admitFromQueue uses redis.zpopmin to remove and return the next batch of customers from the queue

checklist.name: Inventory key pattern
checklist.description: Inventory Redis keys follow the pattern inventory:{productId}

checklist.name: Queue key pattern
checklist.description: Waiting room Redis keys follow the pattern sale_queue:{productId} (or equivalent queue-scoped-by-product pattern)
